context: selection_status is 'skipped', so the human rejected all candidates. The skill must read the status, surface the rationale, and finish at Step 1 without scaffolding a skill, generating scenarios, or invoking any tessl CLI commands beyond what's needed to read the input.

checklist.name: No generated-skill directory created
checklist.description: A generated-skill/ directory was NOT created. tessl skill new was not invoked.

checklist.name: No scenarios.json written
checklist.description: scenarios.json was NOT created. tessl scenario generate was not invoked.

checklist.name: No eval runs
checklist.description: Neither tessl eval run nor any other eval-execution command was invoked. baseline-results.json and with-skill-results.json were NOT created.

checklist.name: selection_rationale surfaced
checklist.description: The agent's response includes the selection_rationale text (the human's reason for skipping).

checklist.name: Finishes cleanly
checklist.description: The agent does not loop, retry, or invent a synthetic selection. It reports the skipped status and finishes.
